scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r build && pnpm --filter @farma/backend prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @farma/backend prisma:validate && pnpm --filter @farma/backend test && python tools/scan_secrets.py && node tools/check_env_sync.mjs && node tools/contract_check.mjs
